nodes.name: incremental_sort.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for incremental sort, verifying sort behavior with partial sorted input and covering plan output.

nodes.name: index_including.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the INCLUDE clause in B-tree indexes, verifying covering index behavior and constraints.

nodes.name: index_including_gist.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for GiST indexes with the INCLUDE clause, verifying non-key column inclusion in GiST indexes.

nodes.name: indexing.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test suite for indexing, covering B-tree, hash, GiST, GIN, partial, and expression indexes.

nodes.name: indirect_toast.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for indirect TOAST storage, verifying large value storage through custom type wrappers.

nodes.name: inet.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for inet and cidr network address types, covering parsing, arithmetic, and comparison operators.

nodes.name: infinite_recurse.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for infinite recursion error handling in rules and functions, verifying proper error detection.

nodes.name: inherit.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for table inheritance, covering constraint inheritance, column types, and DML on inherited hierarchies.

nodes.name: init_privs.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for initial privilege recording, verifying that pg_init_privs is populated correctly for catalog objects.

nodes.name: insert.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for INSERT semantics including single-row, multi-row, SELECT-based inserts, and returning clauses.

nodes.name: insert_conflict.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for INSERT ON CONFLICT (upsert) semantics, covering DO NOTHING and DO UPDATE variants with constraint handling.

nodes.name: int2.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the smallint (int2) data type, covering arithmetic, comparisons, overflow, and casting operations.

nodes.name: int4.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the integer (int4) data type, covering arithmetic operations, bitwise ops, overflow detection, and casting.

nodes.name: int8.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the bigint (int8) data type, covering arithmetic, bit operations, range checks, and conversions.

nodes.name: interval.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the interval data type, covering parsing, arithmetic, formatting, casting, and edge cases in time arithmetic.

nodes.name: join.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for all JOIN types including inner, left/right/full outer, cross, lateral, and self joins with complex predicates.

nodes.name: join_hash.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for hash join operations, verifying hash join plans, batching behavior, and edge cases with large datasets.

nodes.name: json.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for the json data type, covering construction, extraction, path operations, and JSON functions.

nodes.name: json_encoding.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for JSON encoding behavior, verifying Unicode escaping, encoding-specific behavior, and character handling.

nodes.name: jsonb.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for the jsonb (binary JSON) data type, covering all operators, indexing, path queries, and jsonb-specific functions.
